evals.name: hcm-cat-dental
evals.prompt: 4.5kg 12歲公貓，已知HCM，要做dental cleaning，請幫我做麻醉計畫
evals.expected_output: Complete anesthesia checklist for a geriatric HCM cat dental, with HCM-specific drug adjustments, dental nerve blocks, calculated doses from Python script, and monitoring plan

assertions.name: uses_dose_calculator
assertions.text: Runs the dose_calculator.py script with --weight 4.5 --species cat

assertions.name: avoids_acepromazine
assertions.text: Does NOT include acepromazine in premedication (contraindicated in HCM)

assertions.name: includes_esmolol
assertions.text: Lists esmolol in emergency drugs section (for HCM tachycardia)

assertions.name: dental_nerve_blocks
assertions.text: Includes dental nerve blocks (infraorbital and/or inferior alveolar) in local analgesia section

assertions.name: checklist_format
assertions.text: Output is in a printable checklist format with checkbox markers (□) and all 9 sections from the template

assertions.name: calculated_volumes
assertions.text: Drug entries include both mg dose AND mL volume (not just dose range)

assertions.name: traditional_chinese
assertions.text: Main text is in 繁體中文 with drug names in English

assertions.name: monitoring_plan
assertions.text: Monitoring section includes HR, BP, SpO2, ETCO2, temperature with frequencies

evals.name: healthy-dog-ohe
evals.prompt: 25kg 2歲米克斯母犬，ASA I，要做OHE，請給我完整的麻醉方案
evals.expected_output: Standard anesthesia protocol for healthy young dog OHE with multimodal analgesia, local blocks, and full checklist

assertions.name: uses_dose_calculator
assertions.text: Runs the dose_calculator.py script with --weight 25 --species dog

assertions.name: multimodal_analgesia
assertions.text: Includes at least 2 analgesic modalities (e.g., opioid premedication + local block or NSAID)

assertions.name: local_block_for_ohe
assertions.text: Includes intraperitoneal splash block or incisional line block for OHE

assertions.name: fluid_rate
assertions.text: Specifies crystalloid maintenance rate in mL/h (calculated for 25kg)

assertions.name: checklist_format
assertions.text: Output is in a printable checklist format with checkbox markers (□) and all 9 sections

assertions.name: calculated_volumes
assertions.text: Drug entries include both mg dose AND mL volume

assertions.name: emergency_drugs
assertions.text: Emergency section has pre-calculated doses for atropine, epinephrine, and glycopyrrolate

assertions.name: recovery_plan
assertions.text: Recovery section includes pain assessment timing and post-op analgesic plan

evals.name: ckd-cat-mass-removal
evals.prompt: 3.2kg 15歲母貓，CKD stage 2 (creatinine 2.1)，左前肢有一個mass要切除，麻醉計畫
evals.expected_output: Anesthesia protocol for a geriatric CKD cat with renal-protective drug choices, careful fluid management, and regional analgesia

assertions.name: uses_dose_calculator
assertions.text: Runs the dose_calculator.py script with --weight 3.2 --species cat

assertions.name: avoids_nsaids
assertions.text: Explicitly avoids or warns against NSAIDs due to CKD

assertions.name: renal_considerations
assertions.text: Mentions renal-protective strategy: avoiding prolonged hypotension, careful fluid management

assertions.name: dose_reduction
assertions.text: Recommends reduced doses (mentions geriatric dose reduction or uses lower end of dose ranges)

assertions.name: local_regional_block
assertions.text: Includes a local or regional block for the forelimb (e.g., brachial plexus block or local infiltration)

assertions.name: checklist_format
assertions.text: Output is in a printable checklist format with checkbox markers (□)

assertions.name: calculated_volumes
assertions.text: Drug entries include both mg dose AND mL volume

assertions.name: bp_monitoring_emphasis
assertions.text: Emphasizes blood pressure monitoring (given CKD and hypotension risk)
